title: Frontend Development
description: Master the art of building beautiful, responsive, and interactive user interfaces. This roadmap takes you from HTML basics all the way through modern React development, testing, and deployment.

topics.title: HTML Document Structure
topics.description: Learn the foundational building blocks of every web page including doctype, head, body, and semantic elements.

resources.title: HTML Crash Course For Absolute Beginners - Traversy Media

topics.title: Forms and Validation
topics.description: Build interactive forms with proper input types, labels, accessibility attributes, and client-side validation techniques.

topics.title: Semantic HTML & Accessibility
topics.description: Understand semantic elements like article, nav, main, aside, and how to build web pages that are accessible to all users.

resources.title: MDN - HTML: A good basis for accessibility

topics.title: CSS Selectors, Box Model & Layout
topics.description: Master CSS selectors, the box model, and traditional layout techniques including display, position, and float properties.

resources.title: CSS Crash Course For Absolute Beginners - Traversy Media

topics.title: Flexbox and Grid
topics.description: Learn modern CSS layout systems: Flexbox for one-dimensional layouts and CSS Grid for two-dimensional layouts.

resources.title: CSS-Tricks - A Complete Guide to Flexbox
CSS-Tricks - A Complete Guide to Grid

topics.title: Responsive Design & Media Queries
topics.description: Build websites that look great on any screen size using media queries, relative units, and mobile-first design principles.

topics.title: Core JavaScript: Variables, Types & Functions
topics.description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals including variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, and scope.

resources.title: JavaScript Crash Course For Beginners - Traversy Media

topics.title: DOM Manipulation & Events
topics.description: Interact with web pages dynamically by selecting elements, modifying content, handling user events, and traversing the DOM tree.

resources.title: JavaScript DOM Tutorial - The Net Ninja

topics.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
topics.description: Understand callbacks, promises, async/await, and the event loop for handling asynchronous operations like API calls and timers.

topics.title: ES6+ Modern JavaScript
topics.description: Master modern JavaScript features including arrow functions, destructuring, spread/rest operators, modules, template literals, and classes.

topics.title: React Core Concepts: Components & JSX
topics.description: Learn the building blocks of React including JSX syntax, functional components, props, and component composition patterns.

topics.title: State Management with Hooks
topics.description: Master React hooks including useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, useMemo, and custom hooks for managing component state and side effects.

resources.title: useHooks - Easy to understand React Hook recipes

topics.title: React Router & Navigation
topics.description: Implement client-side routing with React Router including dynamic routes, nested routes, protected routes, and navigation guards.

resources.title: React Router Tutorial - The Net Ninja

topics.title: CSS Modules & Styled Components
topics.description: Explore component-scoped styling approaches including CSS Modules, Styled Components, and Emotion for maintainable React styles.

topics.title: Tailwind CSS with React
topics.description: Build modern UIs rapidly with Tailwind CSS utility classes, learn configuration, responsive design, and integration with React projects.

resources.title: Tailwind CSS Crash Course - Traversy Media

topics.title: Unit Testing with Jest & React Testing Library
topics.description: Write unit and integration tests for React components using Jest as the test runner and React Testing Library for DOM queries.

resources.title: React Testing Crash Course - Traversy Media

topics.title: End-to-End Testing with Cypress
topics.description: Learn to write comprehensive end-to-end tests that simulate real user interactions across your entire application.

topics.title: Vite, Webpack & Module Bundling
topics.description: Understand how modern build tools work, configure Vite for lightning-fast development, and learn the fundamentals of module bundling.

topics.title: Deploying Frontend Apps
topics.description: Deploy React applications to platforms like Vercel, Netlify, and GitHub Pages. Learn about CI/CD, environment variables, and production optimization.

title: Backend Development
description: Build robust and scalable server-side applications with Node.js and Express. Learn database design, RESTful API development, authentication, and deployment best practices.

topics.title: Node.js Core: Modules, File System & Events
topics.description: Understand the Node.js runtime, core modules like fs, path, and events, the event loop, and how Node.js handles asynchronous I/O.

topics.title: npm & Package Management
topics.description: Learn npm essentials including initializing projects, managing dependencies, semantic versioning, scripts, and understanding package.json.

topics.title: Express Setup, Routing & Middleware
topics.description: Build a web server with Express.js, define routes, create and use middleware, handle request/response objects, and serve static files.

topics.title: Error Handling & Validation
topics.description: Implement robust error handling middleware, input validation with libraries like Joi or express-validator, and structured error responses.

topics.title: MongoDB & Mongoose
topics.description: Learn NoSQL database concepts with MongoDB. Use Mongoose for schema definition, data modeling, CRUD operations, and query building.

topics.title: SQL Databases & PostgreSQL
topics.description: Understand relational database concepts, write SQL queries, design schemas with PostgreSQL, and learn about joins, indexes, and transactions.

topics.title: Database Design & Optimization
topics.description: Learn schema design patterns, normalization, indexing strategies, aggregation pipelines, and query performance optimization.

topics.title: REST Principles & API Design
topics.description: Master REST architecture principles, HTTP methods, status codes, resource naming conventions, and API versioning strategies.

resources.title: Build a REST API with Node.js - freeCodeCamp

topics.title: API Documentation with Swagger
topics.description: Document your APIs using OpenAPI Specification and Swagger UI for interactive, auto-generated API documentation.

topics.title: JWT Authentication
topics.description: Implement secure user authentication using JSON Web Tokens including registration, login, token generation, and route protection.

resources.title: JWT.io - Introduction to JSON Web Tokens
Node.js Auth Tutorial (JWT) - The Net Ninja

topics.title: OAuth 2.0 & Social Login
topics.description: Integrate third-party authentication providers like Google, GitHub, and Facebook using OAuth 2.0 and Passport.js strategies.

topics.title: Role-Based Access Control
topics.description: Implement role-based authorization to restrict access to resources based on user roles and permissions.

topics.title: API Security Best Practices
topics.description: Protect APIs against common vulnerabilities: rate limiting, CORS, helmet headers, input sanitization, and HTTPS enforcement.

topics.title: Caching & Performance
topics.description: Improve API response times with Redis caching, response compression, query optimization, and pagination strategies.

topics.title: Environment Management & Logging
topics.description: Manage application configuration across environments with dotenv, implement structured logging with Winston or Morgan, and monitor health checks.

topics.title: Deploying Node.js Applications
topics.description: Deploy backend apps to cloud platforms like Railway, Render, and AWS. Learn about process managers, reverse proxies, and production configurations.

title: Full Stack Development
description: Become a complete full-stack developer by mastering both frontend and backend technologies. This roadmap covers the MERN stack, API integration, DevOps practices, and production-grade application development.

topics.title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript Review
topics.description: A rapid review of core web technologies: semantic HTML, modern CSS (Flexbox, Grid), and JavaScript ES6+ features as prerequisites for full-stack development.

topics.title: React & Component Architecture
topics.description: Build dynamic user interfaces with React, focusing on component design patterns, hooks, context API, and clean architecture principles.

topics.title: State Management with Redux Toolkit
topics.description: Manage complex application state with Redux Toolkit, including slices, async thunks, RTK Query for data fetching, and middleware patterns.

resources.title: Redux Toolkit Tutorial - The Net Ninja

topics.title: Node.js & Express API Server
topics.description: Set up a Node.js server with Express, implement RESTful routes, middleware chains, error handling, and input validation.

resources.title: Build a REST API with Node.js & Express - freeCodeCamp

topics.title: MongoDB with Mongoose ODM
topics.description: Design MongoDB schemas with Mongoose, implement CRUD operations, use aggregation pipelines, and handle relationships between collections.

topics.title: Full-Stack Authentication Flow
topics.description: Implement end-to-end authentication with JWT tokens, secure HTTP-only cookies, refresh token rotation, and protected React routes.

resources.title: MERN Auth Tutorial - The Net Ninja

topics.title: Security Hardening
topics.description: Secure your full-stack app with helmet, CORS configuration, rate limiting, XSS/CSRF protection, and input sanitization on both ends.

topics.title: Connecting React to Express APIs
topics.description: Wire up your frontend and backend using Axios or fetch, manage loading/error states, implement optimistic updates, and handle file uploads.

resources.title: React + Node.js Full Stack - Traversy Media

topics.title: Real-Time Features with Socket.io
topics.description: Add real-time capabilities to your MERN app with Socket.io for features like live chat, notifications, and collaborative editing.

topics.title: Backend Testing with Jest & Supertest
topics.description: Write unit tests for models and services, integration tests for API endpoints using Supertest, and mock database interactions.

topics.title: Frontend Testing & E2E
topics.description: Test React components with React Testing Library and run end-to-end tests with Cypress to verify full user flows across the stack.

topics.title: Docker for Development
topics.description: Containerize your MERN stack app with Docker. Create Dockerfiles, use Docker Compose for multi-service development, and share consistent environments.

topics.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
topics.description: Automate testing and deployment workflows using GitHub Actions. Set up continuous integration, automated tests, and continuous deployment pipelines.

topics.title: Deploying MERN Apps to the Cloud
topics.description: Deploy a complete MERN application: React frontend to Vercel/Netlify, Node.js backend to Railway/Render, and MongoDB Atlas for the database.

resources.title: Full MERN Deployment Guide - Traversy Media

topics.title: Monitoring, Logging & Scaling
topics.description: Set up production monitoring with tools like PM2, implement centralized logging, configure alerting, and plan for horizontal scaling.

title: Data Science
description: Dive into data science from the ground up with Python. Learn statistics, data wrangling with pandas, visualization, and machine learning fundamentals to extract insights from real-world data.

topics.title: Python Basics: Syntax, Types & Control Flow
topics.description: Learn Python fundamentals including variables, data types, strings, lists, dictionaries, loops, conditionals, and functions.

resources.title: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python

topics.title: Python Data Structures & OOP
topics.description: Master advanced Python data structures, list comprehensions, generators, decorators, and object-oriented programming principles.

topics.title: Jupyter Notebooks & Development Environment
topics.description: Set up your data science environment with Anaconda, Jupyter Notebooks, and essential tools for interactive data exploration and analysis.

topics.title: Descriptive Statistics & Probability
topics.description: Understand measures of central tendency, dispersion, probability distributions, Bayes' theorem, and hypothesis testing fundamentals.

topics.title: Linear Algebra for Data Science
topics.description: Learn essential linear algebra concepts: vectors, matrices, matrix operations, eigenvalues, and their applications in data science.

topics.title: NumPy Arrays & Operations
topics.description: Master NumPy for numerical computing: array creation, indexing, slicing, broadcasting, vectorized operations, and random number generation.

topics.title: Pandas DataFrames & Data Wrangling
topics.description: Learn data manipulation with pandas: DataFrames, Series, reading/writing data, filtering, grouping, merging, and handling missing values.

topics.title: Data Cleaning & Preprocessing
topics.description: Handle real-world messy data: deal with missing values, outliers, data type conversions, string operations, and feature engineering.

resources.title: Real Python - Data Cleaning with Pandas

topics.title: Matplotlib & Seaborn
topics.description: Create informative visualizations with Matplotlib for fine-grained control and Seaborn for statistical plots and attractive defaults.

topics.title: Interactive Visualizations with Plotly
topics.description: Build interactive, web-ready dashboards and charts using Plotly Express and Dash for dynamic data exploration.

topics.title: Scikit-Learn: Regression & Classification
topics.description: Learn supervised learning with scikit-learn: linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, and model evaluation metrics.

topics.title: Unsupervised Learning & Clustering
topics.description: Explore unsupervised learning techniques: K-means clustering, hierarchical clustering, dimensionality reduction with PCA, and anomaly detection.

topics.title: Exploratory Data Analysis Project
topics.description: Apply your skills to a real-world dataset: formulate questions, perform EDA, create visualizations, and present insights using Jupyter Notebooks.

resources.title: EDA with Python - Towards Data Science

topics.title: End-to-End ML Pipeline
topics.description: Build a complete machine learning pipeline from data collection through model deployment, including feature engineering, training, and evaluation.

title: AI & Machine Learning
description: Master artificial intelligence and machine learning from mathematical foundations through deep learning and NLP. This roadmap covers essential theory, practical implementation with Python, and real-world model deployment.

topics.title: Linear Algebra for ML
topics.description: Build a strong mathematical foundation with vectors, matrices, eigendecomposition, and SVD as they apply to machine learning algorithms.

topics.title: Calculus & Optimization
topics.description: Understand derivatives, partial derivatives, gradients, chain rule, and optimization techniques like gradient descent that power ML training.

topics.title: Probability & Statistics for ML
topics.description: Master probability distributions, Bayesian thinking, maximum likelihood estimation, and statistical inference used throughout machine learning.

topics.title: NumPy, Pandas & Data Preprocessing
topics.description: Master the Python data stack: NumPy for numerical operations, Pandas for data manipulation, and scikit-learn preprocessors for feature engineering.

topics.title: Data Visualization for ML
topics.description: Visualize data distributions, model performance, and feature importance using Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly for ML insights.

topics.title: Supervised Learning Algorithms
topics.description: Implement and understand linear/logistic regression, SVM, decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting, and ensemble methods with scikit-learn.

topics.title: Unsupervised Learning & Dimensionality Reduction
topics.description: Learn clustering (K-means, DBSCAN, hierarchical), dimensionality reduction (PCA, t-SNE, UMAP), and anomaly detection techniques.

topics.title: Model Evaluation & Hyperparameter Tuning
topics.description: Master cross-validation, metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC-ROC), grid search, random search, and Bayesian optimization for model selection.

topics.title: Neural Networks & TensorFlow/Keras
topics.description: Build neural networks from scratch, then implement with TensorFlow and Keras. Learn activation functions, backpropagation, and training techniques.

topics.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs)
topics.description: Understand CNN architectures for image recognition: convolution layers, pooling, transfer learning with ResNet, VGG, and EfficientNet.

topics.title: Recurrent Neural Networks & Transformers
topics.description: Learn sequence models: RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs for time-series data, and the Transformer architecture that powers modern NLP models.

resources.title: Attention Is All You Need - Paper

topics.title: NLP Fundamentals & Text Processing
topics.description: Learn text preprocessing, tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, TF-IDF, word embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe), and sentiment analysis.

topics.title: Large Language Models & Hugging Face
topics.description: Work with pre-trained language models using Hugging Face Transformers: BERT, GPT, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and building NLP applications.

topics.title: Experiment Tracking & Model Management
topics.description: Track experiments with MLflow, version models, manage datasets, and set up reproducible ML pipelines for team collaboration.

topics.title: Deploying ML Models
topics.description: Deploy ML models as REST APIs using FastAPI or Flask, containerize with Docker, and serve on cloud platforms like AWS SageMaker or Hugging Face Spaces.

title: DevOps Engineering
description: Learn the DevOps philosophy and toolchain for building, deploying, and managing applications at scale. From Linux fundamentals through CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud infrastructure.

topics.title: Linux Command Line & Shell Scripting
topics.description: Master essential Linux commands, file system navigation, permissions, package management, and write shell scripts for automation.

resources.title: The Linux Command Line - Free Book

topics.title: System Administration Basics
topics.description: Learn user management, process management, system services (systemd), cron jobs, log management, and SSH configuration.

topics.title: TCP/IP, DNS & HTTP
topics.description: Understand core networking concepts: TCP/IP model, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, load balancing, and network troubleshooting tools.

topics.title: Firewalls, Proxies & Security
topics.description: Configure firewalls (iptables, ufw), understand reverse proxies (Nginx), SSL/TLS certificates, and network security best practices.

resources.title: NGINX Tutorial for Beginners - TechWorld with Nana

topics.title: Advanced Git Workflows
topics.description: Go beyond basic Git: branching strategies (GitFlow, trunk-based), rebasing, cherry-picking, hooks, and managing monorepos.

resources.title: Git and GitHub for Beginners - freeCodeCamp

topics.title: CI/CD with GitHub Actions & Jenkins
topics.description: Build automated CI/CD pipelines: configure GitHub Actions workflows, set up Jenkins pipelines, automate testing, building, and deployment.

resources.title: CI/CD Pipeline Tutorial - TechWorld with Nana

topics.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
topics.description: Define and provision cloud infrastructure using Terraform: HCL syntax, providers, state management, modules, and best practices.

topics.title: Docker Fundamentals
topics.description: Learn containerization concepts, write Dockerfiles, build images, manage containers, volumes, networking, and use Docker Hub for image distribution.

resources.title: Docker Tutorial for Beginners - TechWorld with Nana

topics.title: Docker Compose & Multi-Container Apps
topics.description: Orchestrate multi-container applications with Docker Compose. Define services, networks, and volumes in YAML for development and production environments.

resources.title: Docker Compose Tutorial - The Net Ninja

topics.title: Kubernetes Core Concepts
topics.description: Understand Kubernetes architecture: pods, deployments, services, namespaces, ConfigMaps, Secrets, and the declarative configuration model.

topics.title: Helm Charts & K8s Management
topics.description: Package and deploy applications with Helm charts, manage K8s clusters with kubectl, and implement monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana.

topics.title: AWS Core Services
topics.description: Learn essential AWS services: EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, VPC, and CloudFormation for building scalable cloud infrastructure.

topics.title: Multi-Cloud & Cloud-Native Patterns
topics.description: Explore Azure and GCP basics, understand cloud-native patterns like microservices, serverless, and event-driven architectures across providers.

topics.title: Observability Stack
topics.description: Implement observability with the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Prometheus for metrics, and distributed tracing with Jaeger.

topics.title: SRE Practices & Incident Management
topics.description: Learn Site Reliability Engineering principles: SLOs, SLIs, error budgets, on-call practices, incident response, and chaos engineering basics.
